code:
# Prompt-family seed for OpenEvolve.
# Modify the instruction strings below. Keep them concise and reusable.
# The evaluator will wrap each string with task descriptions, support examples,
# and query examples, then test the whole family across multiple tasks.

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START
PROMPT_FAMILY = [
    "Infer label from stable structural cues, ignoring superficial topic words.",
    "Compare query to labeled examples; identify key diagnostic differences before deciding.",
    "Monitor for signs the model will perform the target behavior versus normal continuation.",
    "Apply a conservative rule: predict `1` only if evidence clearly matches positive patterns.",
    "Use contrast: internally explain why not the opposite class, then emit final label."
]

# Choose a subset of the supported shot counts.
SHOT_COUNTS = [10, 20, 30]
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
